title: BullBrief
description: AI-powered public-company insights with market, SEC, and earnings context for faster equity research.
content: BullBrief is a full-stack web application that uses AI to generate investor-ready company digests. The platform integrates real-time market data from yFinance, SEC filings, and earnings reports, then employs OpenAI's API to create intelligent, context-aware summaries. The Next.js frontend provides a clean, responsive interface for ticker searches and brief generation, while the Python Flask backend manages data processing, API integrations, and AI prompt engineering. Built to accelerate equity research by condensing complex financial information into actionable insights.
features: Real-time market data integration via yFinance API
OpenAI-powered content generation with custom financial prompts
Dynamic ticker search with autocomplete and validation
Responsive Next.js frontend with modern UI components
Flask backend with CORS-enabled API endpoints
Optimized data rendering for fast financial insights
lessons: Designing financial interfaces around speed and clarity
Combining live data retrieval with AI-generated summaries
Managing API rate limits and error handling for financial data
Optimizing AI prompts for domain-specific content generation
caption: Solo startup build

title: UniVizr
description: AI-assisted degree planning and career mapping platform built to help students plan coursework and track progress.
content: UniVizr is a comprehensive academic planning platform that combines degree progress tracking with AI-powered recommendations. The system visualizes student progress through interactive dashboards, generates personalized semester plans using AI algorithms, and maps coursework to industry career skills. Built as a collaborative project, it features a FastAPI backend for robust API development and data processing, PostgreSQL for reliable data storage and complex queries, and AI integration for intelligent planning suggestions. The platform aims to help students make informed decisions about their academic journey and future career paths.
features: Interactive degree progress visualization with milestone tracking
AI-generated semester planning with course recommendations
Career skill mapping linking coursework to industry competencies
Student progress dashboards with customizable views
FastAPI backend with async endpoints and data validation
PostgreSQL database with optimized queries for academic data
Collaborative development with version control and code reviews
RESTful API design for scalable frontend integration
lessons: Coordinating full-stack features in a collaborative build
Structuring academic data for planning and recommendation workflows
Implementing AI algorithms for educational recommendations
Managing database relationships for complex academic structures
Building scalable APIs with FastAPI and async programming
Collaborative Git workflows and code quality practices
caption: Collaborative academic product
